author: lOrm
content: Verified-fixed. send_to_builder at src/vdd/transport.rs:194 and send_to_builder_for_verification at src/vdd/transport.rs:255 both wrap forward_request in tokio::time::timeout (config.adversary.request_timeout_seconds), and both response.json() bodies are also timeout-wrapped at 205 and 266. Symmetric to send_to_adversary. The half-applied #496 mitigation noted in this issue is no longer the case — all three send_* paths are timeout-protected. Closing as duplicate of work already landed.
